skills.name: ReviewEvo
skills.description: Self-improving code reviewer that learns your codebase over time. Analyzes git history, spots churn hotspots, identifies risk, and builds a persistent knowledge base that sharpens every review.

skills.name: OpenTangl
skills.description: Autonomous development engine. You write the vision, it ships the code. Plans features, writes code, creates PRs, reviews, and merges — across multiple repos.
intents: I want AI to write code and create PRs

skills.name: CommitCraft
skills.description: Analyzes your staged diff, detects the repo's commit message style from history, and generates precise conventional commits. Learns your patterns.
intents: what should the commit message be

skills.name: PR Ready
skills.description: Prepares a complete pull request — diff analysis, structured description, reviewer checklist, test plan, and risk flags.

skills.name: TestGen
skills.description: Generates tests for existing code. Detects your testing framework, reads existing test patterns, and produces tests that match your conventions.

skills.name: DebugFlow
skills.description: Structured debugging workflow — reproduce, isolate, root-cause, fix, verify, prevent. Turns chaotic debugging into a systematic protocol.

skills.name: DepDoctor
skills.description: Full dependency health check — outdated packages, known vulnerabilities, unused dependencies, and license compatibility issues.
intents: are my packages up to date

skills.name: DockerInit
skills.description: Generates production-ready Docker configuration for any project. Detects your stack, creates multi-stage Dockerfile, docker-compose, and .dockerignore.

skills.name: GH Actions
skills.description: Generates GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow from your project. Detects build commands, test commands, deploy targets — produces a workflow file that matches your setup.

skills.name: EnvGuard
skills.description: Scans your project for leaked secrets, missing .gitignore entries, incomplete env configurations, and mismatched environment variables.

skills.name: DeadCode
skills.description: Finds unused exports, unreachable functions, orphaned files, and stale imports across your codebase. Answers what can I safely delete.

skills.name: PerfAudit
skills.description: Framework-aware performance analysis. Identifies slow renders, N+1 queries, bundle bloat, memory leaks, and unnecessary re-renders — specific to your stack.

skills.name: BundleDiet
skills.description: Analyzes your JavaScript bundle — what's big, what's unused, what can be lazy-loaded. Produces a concrete size reduction plan with estimated savings.
intents: why is my bundle so big

skills.name: SecurityScan
skills.description: OWASP-aware security audit for web applications. Checks for injection, XSS, auth issues, insecure configurations, and dependency CVEs — tuned to your framework.

skills.name: APIDocs
skills.description: Generates API documentation from your actual handlers and routes. Outputs OpenAPI/Swagger spec or markdown — stays in sync with code.

skills.name: GitRescue
skills.description: Decision tree for common git disasters. Wrong branch, bad merge, lost commits, detached HEAD, force push recovery — the git undo button.

skills.name: ReadmeCraft
skills.description: Generates a comprehensive README from your project structure, package.json, and codebase. Not a template — reads your actual project and writes a real README.

skills.name: RefactorSafe
skills.description: Multi-step refactoring with verification gates at each stage. Rename, restructure, extract, consolidate — with proof that nothing broke at every step.
intents: extract this into a separate file

skills.name: MigrationPilot
skills.description: Framework and library version migration with breaking change detection. Upgrades major versions step-by-step with verification between each change.

skills.name: LicenseCheck
skills.description: Scans all dependencies for license compatibility. Flags copyleft licenses in proprietary projects, missing licenses, and license conflicts.
intents: are my dependencies open source safe
